channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Live coverage of England vs Australia in the Women’s T20 World Cup final at Lord’s
item.description: This live report follows the Women’s T20 Cricket World Cup final between England and Australia at Lord’s, where both unbeaten sides meet in a highly anticipated clash. Australia won the toss and elect...

item.title: Bill Clinton Criticizes Trump's Immigration Policies Amid Political Divisions
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton criticized President Donald Trump's administration for its immigration enforcement policies and the deep political divisions in the United States, while Trump celebrated ...

item.title: Canadian PM Carney to Attend NATO Summit in Turkey
item.description: Prime Minister Justin Trudeau's chief of staff, David Carney, will travel to Turkey for the NATO summit, a move that highlights Canada's diplomatic engagement with key allies amid ongoing global tensi...

item.title: Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu's Kuppam Development Plan Focuses on Agri-tech and Food Processing
item.description: Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu announced a transformative roadmap for Kuppam, aiming to establish it as a hub for horticulture, food processing, and agro-based industries. The plan includes partn...

item.title: Opec+ Increases Oil Output Amid Hormuz Export Recovery
item.description: Opec+ has agreed to increase oil production quotas by 188,000 barrels per day starting August, adding to global supply as oil prices fall due to the gradual reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for expor...

item.title: Key Factors Contributing to Bodaboda Accidents in Tanzania
item.description: Motorcycle taxi accidents, known as bodaboda incidents, remain a critical safety issue in Tanzania. Authorities and transport experts have identified several factors contributing to the high rate of c...

item.title: IEBC staff member dies in fatal Nakuru–Eldoret highway crash, several injured
item.description: An Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) official has died following a tragic road accident on the Nakuru–Eldoret Highway in Kenya. The incident occurred on Friday, July 3, 2026, as t...

item.title: Call for Dialogue on Migrant Integration Amid Protests
item.description: The article discusses the growing tension between South African authorities and migrant communities, highlighting the government's struggle to address undocumented immigration. Protests, led by groups...

item.title: Bending Spoons goes public, spotlighting its aggressive digital brand acquisition strategy
item.description: Bending Spoons, a Milan-based technology conglomerate, has recently gone public on the Nasdaq, drawing significant attention after briefly reaching a market capitalization above $25 billion. The compa...

item.title: Fan Spends Savings to Attend World Cup but Struggles to Secure Final Ticket
item.description: Seb Reader, a 28-year-old business development manager from the UK, made a bold decision to return to his family home in January to cut living costs and save for the 2026 World Cup. By living with his...

item.description: The article presents an interactive glossary designed to help readers understand the complex terminology surrounding Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial. It includes direct translations of...

item.title: Nine people, including a young girl, killed in separate tribal violence incidents in Qila Abdullah and Dera Bugti
item.description: At least nine people, including a young girl, lost their lives in two separate violent incidents in Balochistan on Sunday, according to officials. The first incident occurred in the Killi Badawan area...

item.title: First global map reveals the vast underground fungal network supporting Earth’s ecosystems
item.description: A new international study has produced the first global map of the planet’s underground mycorrhizal fungal network, revealing an astonishingly large and complex system that plays a crucial role in sus...

item.title: Moozlie Mabena's Ndebele Cultural Statement at Durban July
item.description: Moozlie Mabena made a striking fashion statement at the Hollywoodbets Durban July by embracing Ndebele cultural heritage. The event, themed 'country allure,' saw many attendees opt for cowboy-inspired...

item.title: BKTC constitutes four-member inquiry committee to investigate alleged irregularities in Badrinath Temple donations
item.description: The Badrinath-Kedarnath Temple Committee (BKTC) has constituted a four-member inquiry committee to investigate allegations of irregularities in the handling of donations and offerings at Shri Badrinat...

item.title: Eswari Gunasagar condemns AI-generated fake images and online harassment incident
item.description: Singaporean actress Eswari Gunasagar has publicly addressed a distressing incident involving AI-generated fake images of herself circulating online. The manipulated content depicted her with a man at ...

item.title: Inuk Man Sentenced to 33 Months for Assaulting Uncle with Metal Bar
item.description: A Quebec judge has sentenced Timothy Assapa, a 34-year-old Inuk man, to 33 months in prison for assaulting his uncle, Sajuilie Assapa, with a metal bar in 2025. The attack left the uncle with severe h...
